---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: ''
labels: 'type:feature,needs-design'
assignees: ''
---

**Is this on the roadmap?**
Check [`ROADMAP.md`](../../ROADMAP.md) first. If it is, link the relevant section and add context about your specific use case.

**Problem this solves**
What are you trying to do, and what is stopping you? Concrete use cases are more useful than abstract descriptions.

**Proposed solution**
Describe the API or behaviour change you have in mind. If you have a specific interface in mind, sketch it out:

```ts
// example API sketch
```

**Alternatives considered**
What workarounds have you tried? Why don't they work for you?

**Package / area affected**
Which part of the codebase would this touch? (e.g. `@orbital-stellar/pulse-core`, `@orbital-stellar/pulse-notify`)

**Additional context**
Links, prior art in similar projects, Stellar SEPs, etc.
